description: Creator Dashboard, Verification System, Lifeframe Premium features, enhanced profile with followers/following lists, and complete UI polish with iOS liquid glass design.
steps: 1. Create src/pages/CreatorDashboard.jsx: Analytics page showing total post views, total reel views, followers growth (last 7 days count from followers subcollection), top posts by likes, engagement rate calculation, posts count over time. Use glass card layout with stat cards and simple bar/line indicators (CSS-only, no chart library)

2. Create src/pages/Verification.jsx: Verification request form with fields (full name, reason, category, social links, ID upload via Cloudinary). Submits to 'verificationRequests' Firestore collection with status pending. Show request status if already submitted

3. Create src/pages/Premium.jsx: Premium subscription page showing features (verified badge, premium profile ring, priority in search, exclusive themes). Toggle premium status on user profile document (isPremium field). Premium settings page
4. Create src/pages/FollowersList.jsx: Page showing followers of a user (read from users/{uid}/followers subcollection, fetch each user's profile). Follow/unfollow buttons inline
5. Create src/pages/FollowingList.jsx: Page showing who a user follows (read from users/{uid}/following subcollection, fetch each user's profile). Unfollow buttons inline

6. Update src/pages/Profile.jsx: Add verified badge (blue checkmark) if user has isVerified:true. Add premium ring (gradient border animation) if isPremium:true. Add links to followers/following lists (clickable counts). Add Creator Dashboard link for own profile. Add reels tab. Show reels count in stats
8. Update src/components/Layout.jsx: Add menu/settings option to access dashboard, verification, premium pages

9. Rewrite src/styles/index.css: Complete liquid glass UI overhaul - add premium ring animation, verified badge styles, dashboard stat cards, creator analytics styles, followers list styles, enhance existing styles for Instagram/iOS-like polish, add dark mode enhancements, smooth transitions everywhere, better mobile responsiveness
10. Update .env.example to document all required environment variables clearly
11. Update README.md with complete setup instructions, features list, deployment guide for Vercel
acceptance_criteria: Creator Dashboard shows analytics with real Firestore data
Verification request form submits to Firestore
Premium page allows toggling premium status
Verified badge appears on verified user profiles
Premium ring animation shows on premium user avatars
Followers and Following lists are navigable from profile
All new pages follow the liquid glass design system
README contains complete setup and deployment instructions
verification: Verify all new files have valid JSX/JS syntax
Verify all routes in App.jsx match the new pages
Verify CSS has no syntax errors and all class names used in JSX exist in stylesheets
